description: You are an occupational health and safety specialist contracted by the City of Bologna to conduct a surrogate safety analysis of the signalized intersections in the Acosta corridor using the scenario data at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/. Your objective is to produce a safety audit report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/intersection_safety_report.csv and a summary finding at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/safety_audit_summary.txt based on Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) data. Configure the simulation to output SSM data for all vehicles to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ssm_output.xml, tracking Time-To-Collision (TTC threshold <= 3.0s) and Deceleration Rate to Avoid Crash
